headline: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Can Aflac's Japan Business Help Deliver a Quack-worthy Q1 Beat?
summary: AFL heads into its April 29 Q1 report with Japan earnings expected to rise 10.9%, even as premiums and investment income are expected to decline.

headline: Trucordia Adds Shelley Rathsam as Vice President on M&A Team
summary: Trucordia, a top 20 U.S. insurance brokerage, announced today that Shelley Rathsam has joined the company as Vice President on its Mergers and Acquisitions team. Rathsam comes to Trucordia after nearly five years at Arthur J. Gallagher, where she led M&A sourcing and deal execution across U.S., Western Canada, Australia, and New Zealand.

headline: What You Need to Know Ahead of Arthur J. Gallagher’s Earnings Release
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher is poised to report its first-quarter results next week, and analysts are anticipating double-digit earnings growth.
